title: Add moist Held-Suarez run script

body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
closes #776

## Content
- [x] pass in `job_id` to runs via command line
- [x] remove `job_id` from config files
- [x] delete GPU-specific config files
- [x] remove `run_name` option, which was a duplicate of `job_id`
- [x] replace all uses of `run_name` with `job_id` (this is more consistent with Atmos's convention)
- [x] set animations to false if running on GPU (this was manually being specified in config files before)
- [x] confirm no behavioral changes from main

<!---

title: pass in job_id as command line argument
